user.title: EV Trip Planner - Vehicle Setup
user.description: Configure your electric vehicle for trip planning

data_description.vehicle_name: A friendly name for your vehicle (e.g., 'Chispitas', 'Morgan')

sensors.title: Vehicle Sensors
sensors.description: Select the sensors for battery monitoring

data_description.soc_sensor: Select the battery State of Charge sensor. Look for sensors ending in '_soc', '_battery_level', or from OVMS/renault integrations. Example: sensor.ovms_chispitas_metric_v_b_soc or sensor.renault_battery_level
data_description.battery_capacity: Total battery capacity in kWh (e.g., 40 for 40kWh battery, 62 for 62kWh). Check your vehicle specs. Example: 40
data_description.charging_power: Maximum charging power in kW (e.g., 7.2 for 7.2kW charger, 22 for 22kW three-phase). Check your wallbox specs. Example: 7.2
data_description.range_sensor: Optional: Sensor showing remaining range in km. Look for sensors ending in '_range', '_range_est', or '_car_range_remaining'. Example: sensor.ovms_chispitas_metric_v_b_range_est or sensor.renault_range
data_description.charging_status: Optional: Binary sensor that shows 'on' when vehicle is charging. Look for sensors with 'charging', 'charge', or 'plugged' in the name. Example: binary_sensor.ovms_chispitas_charging or binary_sensor.renault_charging

data_description.consumption: Average energy consumption per km (e.g., 0.15 for 15 kWh/100km). Higher values = more energy needed. Example: 0.15
data_description.safety_margin: Extra battery percentage to keep as buffer (e.g., 10 = always keep 10% charge). Prevents running out of battery. Example: 10
data_description.safety_margin_percent: Percentage buffer applied to the energy deficit (not arrival reserve). Example: 10% on a 10kWh deficit adds 1kWh extra buffer.
data_description.control_type: How should charging be controlled? 'Notifications Only (no control)' means no automatic control, just alerts.

emhass.title: EMHASS Integration (Optional)
emhass.description: Configure EMHASS integration for smart charging optimization. This step is optional - you can skip it and configure later.

data_description.planning_horizon: Number of days EMHASS should plan for (1-30 days). Usually matches your daily EMHASS optimization horizon. Example: 7
data_description.planning_horizon_days: Number of days EMHASS should plan for (1-30 days). Usually matches your daily EMHASS optimization horizon. Example: 7
data_description.planning_sensor: Optional: EMHASS sensor with planning horizon (e.g., sensor.emhass_planning_horizon). If your EMHASS optimizer publishes this sensor, select it. Otherwise use manual value.
data_description.planning_sensor_entity: Optional: EMHASS sensor with planning horizon (e.g., sensor.emhass_planning_horizon). If your EMHASS optimizer publishes this sensor, select it. Otherwise use manual value.
data_description.max_deferrable_loads: Maximum number of simultaneous deferrable loads EMHASS is configured for (10-100). Usually 50. Example: 50
data_description.enable_planning_sensor: Check to override planning horizon with sensor value. When checked, the planning horizon will be read from the selected sensor instead of the manual value above. When unchecked, the manual value will be used.
data_description.enable_max_loads_override: Check to enable custom maximum deferrable loads. When checked, you can set a custom value below instead of the default (50). When unchecked, the default value (50) will be used.

presence.title: Presence Detection
presence.description: Configure presence detection to prevent charging when vehicle is away. Charging sensor is required.

data_description.charging_sensor: REQUIRED: Binary sensor that indicates if vehicle is currently charging (e.g., binary_sensor.ovms_chispitas_charging). Shows 'on' when charging. This is mandatory for the configuration.
data_description.home_sensor: Optional: Binary sensor that indicates if vehicle is at home (e.g., binary_sensor.chispitas_home). Shows 'on' when vehicle is home.
data_description.plugged_sensor: Optional: Binary sensor that indicates if charging cable is connected (e.g., binary_sensor.chispitas_plugged). Shows 'on' when plugged.
data_description.home_coordinates: Optional: Your home coordinates as 'latitude, longitude' (e.g., '40.1234, -3.5678'). Used if no home sensor available.
data_description.vehicle_coordinates_sensor: Optional: Sensor with vehicle GPS coordinates (e.g., sensor.ovms_location). Used with home coordinates for distance calculation.
data_description.vehicle_coordinates_sensor_lat: Optional: Sensor providing vehicle latitude (e.g., sensor.ovms_chispitas_metric_v_pos_latitude). Use with longitude sensor below.
data_description.vehicle_coordinates_sensor_lon: Optional: Sensor providing vehicle longitude (e.g., sensor.ovms_chispitas_metric_v_pos_longitude). Use with latitude sensor above.
data_description.notification_service: Service to call for notifications (e.g., notify.mobile_app). Used to alert when charging needed but not possible.

notifications.title: Notifications (Optional)
notifications.description: Configure notifications to receive alerts when charging is needed but not possible. This step is optional.

data_description.notification_service: Select the notification service to use (e.g., notify.mobile_app_your_phone). This is optional - you can skip this step.
data_description.notification_devices: Select the devices to receive notifications. Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. This is optional - you can skip this step.

error.invalid_planning_horizon: Planning horizon must be between 1 and 365 days. Recommended: 7 days for weekly recurrence
error.invalid_max_deferrable_loads: Maximum deferrable loads must be between 10 and 100
error.home_sensor_not_found: The selected home sensor was not found. Please check the entity ID.
error.plugged_sensor_not_found: The selected plugged sensor was not found. Please check the entity ID.
error.charging_sensor_required: Charging sensor is required to configure this vehicle. This sensor indicates if the vehicle is currently charging.
error.charging_sensor_not_found: The selected charging sensor was not found. Please check the entity ID.
error.notification_service_not_found: The selected notification service was not found. Please check the entity ID and ensure the notify integration is configured.
